basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 at nitm.ac.in. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced under the NIT Meghalaya JRF Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing M.Tech in Nanoelectronics, Microelectronics, Sensors or related disciplines, M.Sc. (Chemistry/ Physics) with valid qualification, or B.Tech in ECE or related discipline with GATE (CGPA above 8.0) are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 17 August 2026. The official notification PDF

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech in Nanoelectronics/microelectronics/sensors or related disciplines, M.Sc. (Chemistry/Physics) with valid qualification, B.Tech in ECE or related with GATE (CGPA above 8.0)
qualification.details: M.Tech. in Nanoelectronics/microelectronics/sensors or related disciplines with experience in semiconductor devices/sensors and simulation. M.Sc. (Chemistry/Physics) with valid qualification. GATE-qualified candidates with a B.Tech (CGPA above 8.0) in Electrical Communication Engineering or related disciplines. Knowledge of semiconductor, first principles simulation/density functional theory is desirable.

salary_details.details: INR 37,000/- p.m. for the first two years and INR 42,000/- p.m. for the third year.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Meghalaya JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Meghalaya Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

NIT Meghalaya JRF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech. in Nanoelectronics/microelectronics/sensors or related disciplines with experience in semiconductor devices/sensors and simulation. M.Sc. (Chemistry/Physics) with valid qualification. GATE-qualified candidates with a B.Tech (CGPA above 8.0) in Electrical Communication Engineering or related disciplines. Knowledge of semiconductor, first principles simulation/density functional theory is desirable.

content_sections.text: INR 37,000/- p.m. for the first two years and INR 42,000/- p.m. for the third year.

content_sections.heading: NIT Meghalaya JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Meghalaya JRF Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Meghalaya JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Meghalaya JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 17 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Tech in Nanoelectronics/microelectronics/sensors or related fields, or an M.Sc. in Chemistry/Physics with valid qualifications, or a GATE-qualified B.Tech in ECE with a CGPA above 8.0.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya).
